articles.title: US intercepts and seizes Iranian-flagged cargo ship, Trump says
articles.summary: Tehran vows retaliation soon for what it calls an "act of armed piracy", which comes as the US prepares for a second round of talks.

articles.title: Man kills seven of his children, and an eighth child, in Louisiana mass shooting
